expectations.text: Uses OpenAI client with stream: true option
expectations.evidence: Code shows: stream: await openai.chat.completions({ ..., stream: true })

expectations.text: Uses for await loop to process streaming chunks
expectations.evidence: Code shows: for await (const chunk of stream)

expectations.text: Extracts delta content from chat completion chunks
expectations.evidence: Code shows: const content = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content || ''

expectations.text: Processes tokens in real-time (no buffering entire response)
expectations.evidence: Code shows process.stdout.write(content) inside for await loop - real-time output

expectations.text: Uses eventStream() or jsonEventStream() method from fetcher-eventstream
expectations.evidence: Code uses toJsonServerSentEventStream() from '@ahoo-wang/fetcher-eventstream'

expectations.text: Implements TerminateDetector for [DONE] signal
expectations.evidence: Code shows: const terminateOnDone: TerminateDetector = event => event.data === '[DONE]'

expectations.text: Correctly parses SSE event fields (data, event, id, retry)
expectations.evidence: Interface ChatCompletionChunk properly typed with choices array

expectations.text: Properly terminates/cleans up stream when [DONE] is received
expectations.evidence: toJsonServerSentEventStream handles termination automatically via TerminateDetector

expectations.text: Uses streaming LLM client with event stream processing
expectations.evidence: OpenAI client with stream: true and for await loop processing

expectations.text: Updates UI incrementally as tokens arrive (not after full response)
expectations.evidence: setCurrentResponse(fullResponse) called inside for await loop - real-time updates

expectations.text: Tracks and displays progress (chunk count or similar)
expectations.evidence: setChunkCount(chunks) incremented per token, displayed in UI: '({chunkCount} chunks)'

expectations.text: Accumulates and displays the full response as it builds
expectations.evidence: fullResponse string accumulated and displayed via currentResponse state

expectations.text: Uses OpenAI client with stream: true option
expectations.evidence: Code shows: stream: await openai.chat.completions.create({ ..., stream: true })

expectations.text: Uses for await loop to process streaming chunks
expectations.evidence: Code shows: for await (const chunk of stream)

expectations.text: Extracts delta content from chat completion chunks
expectations.evidence: Code shows: const content = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content || ''

expectations.text: Processes tokens in real-time (no buffering entire response)
expectations.evidence: process.stdout.write is used but basic implementation lacks proper real-time streaming patterns from skill

expectations.text: Uses eventStream() or jsonEventStream() method from fetcher-eventstream
expectations.evidence: Manual TextDecoder and ReadableStream parsing - no fetcher-eventstream usage

expectations.text: Implements TerminateDetector for [DONE] signal
expectations.evidence: Basic string check 'data === [DONE]' without TerminateDetector type

expectations.text: Correctly parses SSE event fields (data, event, id, retry)
expectations.evidence: Only parses 'data: ' prefix, ignores event, id, retry fields

expectations.text: Properly terminates/cleans up stream when [DONE] is received
expectations.evidence: Basic termination with return statement when [DONE] received

notes: Fell back to manual parsing without TypeDetector

expectations.text: Uses streaming LLM client with event stream processing
expectations.evidence: OpenAI chat.completions.create with stream: true

expectations.text: Updates UI incrementally as tokens arrive (not after full response)
expectations.evidence: No setState inside stream loop - response only shown after complete

expectations.text: Tracks and displays progress (chunk count or similar)
expectations.evidence: No chunk counting or progress tracking implemented

expectations.text: Accumulates and displays the full response as it builds
expectations.evidence: Response only added to messages after full stream completes
